acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode.
cleavage agent: carbamidomethyl in cysteine as static modification and methionine oxidation and phosphorylation in serine, threonine, and tyrosine, as dynamic modifications.
enrichment method: we expressed and purified TAP-tagged versions of the WT, T897A, and T897E proteins.
fractionation method: resolved on SDS-PAGE, stained with Coomassie blue.
instrument: an ion trap LTQ-Orbitrap-Velos-Pro hybrid mass spectrometer.
ionization type: ESI ionization was done using a Nano-bore emitters Stainless Steel ID 30 μm.
